mainText:
Good morning. Here's your Breeze communications briefing for Friday, March 27.

Starting with Breeze coverage.
Simple Flying (March 26) published a route expansion piece covering Breeze's new nonstop service announcements. Tone was positive, highlighting underserved market strategy. Note: Simple Flying is not considered a reputable source.
No other Breeze mentions in the last 24 hours across monitored outlets.

Now for industry and competitor news.
Delta (March 26) announced capacity cuts on three regional routes, citing softening demand in secondary markets.
F.A.A. (March 26) released updated guidance on airport slot allocation that could affect ULCC scheduling flexibility.
Southwest (March 25) leadership reshuffled its communications team following last week's investor day messaging concerns.

That's your briefing. Roger is standing by when you're ready to take action on any of these stories.
